title: Aktierna tradingprofilen tror på nu
summary_md:
# Aktierna tradingprofilen tror på nu

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-12  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

A trading-profile guest discusses an 'inverted-hype' Swedish small-cap portfolio, favouring beaten-down, turnaround names over crowded momentum stocks. Key conviction picks are Husqvarna (strong report, cleaned-up balance sheet, ~44 SEK), Nobia (kitchen-maker turnaround after a painful factory build and rights issue), and a speculative bet on Truecaller at 13-14 SEK. The mood is constructive but selective, emphasising recovery stories with managed debt.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 HUSQ-B — Husqvarna | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 70%

Strong report with improved operating margin, factories and debt fixed, surviving Chinese competition; trades ~44 SEK and hasn't run up much.

#### Reasoning

Guest views the latest report as genuinely good (operating margin), with the turnaround visible: factories sorted, debt reduced, and Chinese competition contained. The stock has even given back the report-day gain, so entry near 44 SEK looks attractive for a quality industrial recovery.

#### Sell Triggers

- if next-quarter margins fail to hold
- if Chinese competition erodes share
- if debt reduction reverses

> *"Husqvarna, otroligt fin rapport de kom med... Handlas här kring 44 kronor, tycker jag. Borde vara ett ganska bra köp."*

---

### 🟢 NOBI — Nobia | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Kitchen maker through painful factory build and a now-completed rights issue; exited UK to focus on the Nordics; only automated kitchen maker so should have a cost edge.

#### Reasoning

The turnaround thesis: Nobia survived the disastrous Jönköping factory build and completed its rights issue. With the UK divested and a Nordic focus, plus being the only automated kitchen producer (lower costs, survives weak markets longest), a consumption rebound could make it a 'new Svedbergs'. Caveat: factory ramp not complete and execution unproven.

#### Sell Triggers

- if factory production fails to ramp fully
- if Nordic kitchen demand stays weak
- if normal 12-14% margins aren't reached

> *"Nobia tror jag också på... köksmarknaden är en sund business... de är de enda automatiserade kökstillverkaren och då bör man ha lägre kostnader."*

---

### 🟢 TRUE-B — Truecaller | **BUY** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Heavily shorted, beaten down to 13-14 SEK from ~80; management let price fall but kept buybacks; premium/India revenue growing as ad revenue shrinks.

#### Reasoning

A speculative 'chance position': management has done nothing to defend a heavily shorted stock and released all bad news, but buybacks continue and the premium model plus India revenue is improving while volatile ad/betting-style revenue declines. Cheap at 13-14 SEK vs ~80 when hyped, but requires deep knowledge of opaque India dynamics.

#### Sell Triggers

- if India monetisation stalls
- if ad/premium revenue keeps declining
- if buybacks stop

> *"nu börjar man bli ett ganska bra bolag och då får man det på 13-14 kronor... Så det är lite chansposition jag ändå har."*

---

### 🟠 ABSO — Absolent | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Described as a forgotten small-cap in commercial-kitchen/industrial-air filtration with an environmental angle.

#### Reasoning

Mentioned positively as an overlooked small-cap operating in commercial-kitchen extraction and industrial-air/environmental cleaning. No explicit price target or catalyst given, so it reads as a name worth keeping on the radar rather than a high-conviction buy.

#### Sell Triggers

- if niche industrial demand weakens

> *"Absolent tycker jag är lite bortglömt småbolag. Lite inom storkök och miljöbolag för att hålla industriluften ren."*

---

### 🟠 ANOD-B — Addnode Group | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Former darling now branded an 'AI loser' and dropped from small-cap indices, but Q1 report deemed okay.

#### Reasoning

Contrarian angle: the market treats Addnode as an AI casualty and has ejected it from indices, yet the guest found the Q1 report perfectly fine. Implies the negativity may be overdone, but no clear buy catalyst is given — a name to monitor for a sentiment reversal.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI disruption genuinely erodes its software business
- if subsequent reports deteriorate

> *"Adnode, alla säger att det är den här AI-förloraren, var ju en riktig, riktig darling... Tyckte Q1-rapporten var helt okej."*

---

### 🟠 BHG — BHG (Bygghemma Group) | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Pushed down and bottomed out, with debt now under control after an aggressive acquisition phase.

#### Reasoning

A beaten-down recovery candidate: BHG was depressed and appears to have bottomed, having brought down the high leverage it carried during its hottest acquisition phase. Mentioned as part of the inverted-hype portfolio but without a strong explicit conviction call.

#### Sell Triggers

- if consumer/online building-goods demand weakens
- if leverage rises again

> *"BHG är ju bygghemma-group. Också nedtryckt, körde botten, fick ordning på skuldsättningen efter den förvärvssektorn."*

---

### 🟡 RAY-B — RaySearch Laboratories | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Fine, stable company recently hit by an insider issue and a weaker last report.

#### Reasoning

Described as a nice, stable stock that has 'taken a beating' lately, dented both by an insider-related issue and a disappointing latest report. The tone is cautious rather than directional — a quality name currently under pressure, best held/watched until the report trend improves.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the next report disappoints again
- if further insider/governance issues emerge

> *"Raysearch... Fin aktie, stabilt bolag, men tagit stryk nu i sista tiden. Dels både av insider-grejen och av att den sista rapporten inte var så bra."*

---
